messages.content: Check my calendar on 2026-08-11, then create event Review at the available time.

function.description: Get calendar availability for a date.
function.name: get_calendar

function.description: Create an event at an exact date and time.
function.name: create_event

{"id": "chatcmpl-d981e68b-6ec9-48dc-910c-3425dd5d1bf1", "system_fingerprint": "0.31.3-0.32.0-macOS-26.5.2-arm64-arm-64bit-Mach-O-applegpu_g16s", "object": "chat.completion", "model": "mlx-community/Phi-4-mini-instruct-4bit", "created": 1784649823, "choices": [{"index": 0, "finish_reason": "stop", "message": {"role": "assistant", "content": "I'm sorry, but I can't directly access or check your calendar on 2026-08-11 as I don't have real-time data access or the ability to manage personal data unless provided directly in the interaction. However, I can guide you on how to manually check your calendar on a specific date and create an event on most common calendar applications:

1. **To check your calendar on a specific date (2026-08-11):**
   - On a desktop computer, you can open Google Calendar (calendar.google.com), Outlook (outlook.com), or any other calendar application you use, and look for the date in August 2026 to see if there are any events scheduled on that day.
   - On a mobile device, launch the calendar application (like Google Calendar on iOS or Android, or Outlook on iOS or iPad), and look for the date in August 2026 to see scheduled events.

2. **To create an event (e.g., "Review") on a specific date (2026-08-11):**
   - On a desktop computer:
     - In Google Calendar, click on the date (2026-08-11) in the left-hand calendar view, then click on "Create" or "New Event."
     - In Outlook, double-click on the date (2026-08-11) in the calendar view, then click on "New Meeting" or "New Event."
   - On a mobile device:
     - In Google Calendar on iOS or Android, open the calendar application, go to the date (2026-08-11), and look for an option to add an event (usually a "+" icon or a "New Event" option).
     - In Outlook on iOS or iPad, open the calendar application, go to the date (2026-08-11), and look for an option to add an event (usually a "+" icon or a "New Event" option).

Remember to check if you already have an event scheduled on that date first to avoid double booking. If you find an available slot, you can simply click on it, add a title (e.g., "Review"), and fill in the rest of the event details as needed (time, location, description, etc.). Save or send the calendar invite to the relevant individuals as required."}}], "usage": {"prompt_tokens": 24, "completion_tokens": 476, "total_tokens": 500, "prompt_tokens_details": {"cached_tokens": 0}}}
